parameters.query:
SELECT 'PERFORMANCE_CARD' as doc_type, entity_id || '_' || date::text as doc_id,
  'DOC_TYPE=PERFORMANCE_CARD\nDATE=' || date || '\nLEVEL=' || entity_level || '\nID=' || entity_id ||
  '\nSPEND=' || spend || '\nIMPRESSIONS=' || impressions || '\nCLICKS=' || clicks ||
  '\nCONVERSIONS=' || conversions || '\nFREQUENCY=' || ROUND(frequency,2) ||
  '\nCTR=' || ROUND(ctr*100,3) || '%\nCPA=' || COALESCE(cpa::text,'N/A') as text_content,
  json_build_object('doc_type','PERFORMANCE_CARD','entity_level',entity_level,'entity_id',entity_id,'date',date::text,'funnel_stage','PERFORMANCE') as metadata
FROM meta_insights_daily
WHERE date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
  AND entity_level IN ('adset','ad')
ORDER BY date DESC
LIMIT 500;
INSERT INTO embedding_job_runs (doc_type, doc_count, status) VALUES ('PERFORMANCE_CARD', {{$items().length}}, 'SUCCESS');
